summary: Comprehensive security testing of GreenLink Agritech Platform covering OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities. 23/24 tests passed. Found 4 security issues requiring attention.

critical.issue: JWT SECRET_KEY uses weak default value: 'greenlink-secret-key-change-in-production'. No SECRET_KEY in .env means default is used.
critical.recommendation: Add strong random SECRET_KEY to backend/.env and remove default fallback

critical.issue: Password reset endpoint exposes simulation_code in response. This leaks the reset code directly to the API response.
critical.recommendation: Remove simulation_code from production response or make it conditional on a development flag

minor.issue: CORS_ORIGINS set to '*' allows any origin. This could enable CSRF attacks from malicious sites.
minor.recommendation: Restrict CORS_ORIGINS to specific allowed domains

minor.issue: No rate limiting detected. 10+ rapid failed login attempts allowed without throttling.
minor.recommendation: Implement rate limiting using slowapi or similar middleware

minor.issue: Token expiration set to 7 days (ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES = 60 * 24 * 7). May be too long for sensitive data.
minor.recommendation: Consider shorter expiration (e.g., 1 hour) with refresh token mechanism

authentication: JWT token validation - PASS: Invalid tokens properly rejected
Tampered token rejection - PASS: Modified tokens rejected
Missing auth header - PASS: Protected endpoints require authentication
Wrong credentials - PASS: Invalid credentials rejected with 401
authorization_rbac: Cooperative endpoints restricted - PASS: Admin cannot access cooperative dashboard (403)
Admin endpoints restricted - PASS: Non-admin users cannot access admin features
Supplier endpoints restricted - PASS: Non-supplier users cannot access supplier features
input_validation: NoSQL injection login - PASS: MongoDB injection payloads rejected
NoSQL injection search - PASS: Injection strings handled safely (no server errors)
SQL injection registration - PASS: SQL injection payloads don't cause server errors
data_protection: Password not in login response - PASS: hashed_password excluded from user response
Password not in profile response - PASS: Password fields properly removed
JWT secret not exposed - PASS: Secret key not leaked in API responses
MongoDB ObjectId serialization - PASS: _id converted to string
password_security: Weak password validation - PASS: Passwords < 6 chars rejected
Password hashing - PASS: Uses bcrypt via passlib

jwt_secret_weakness.problem: Default secret key is predictable and publicly known. If SECRET_KEY env var is not set, anyone knowing this default can forge valid JWT tokens.
jwt_secret_weakness.fix:
1. Add SECRET_KEY to /app/backend/.env with strong random value
2. Remove default fallback: SECRET_KEY = os.environ['SECRET_KEY']

password_reset_code_exposure.problem: Reset code is exposed in API response when SIMULATION_MODE is true (default). Password reset can be bypassed.
password_reset_code_exposure.fix: Remove simulation_code from response or set SIMULATION_MODE=false in production

cors_wildcard.problem: Any website can make authenticated requests to this API if user has valid credentials
cors_wildcard.fix: Set CORS_ORIGINS to specific allowed domains: CORS_ORIGINS='https://pdc-modernization.preview.emergentagent.com'

no_rate_limiting.problem: No rate limiting allows brute force attacks on login and password reset
no_rate_limiting.fix: Add slowapi middleware: pip install slowapi and configure rate limits

action_items: CRITICAL: Add SECRET_KEY to /app/backend/.env with strong random value (32+ chars)
CRITICAL: Set SIMULATION_MODE=false or remove simulation_code from password reset response
MEDIUM: Change CORS_ORIGINS from '*' to specific allowed origins
MEDIUM: Implement rate limiting on login and password reset endpoints
LOW: Consider shorter JWT expiration with refresh tokens
critical_code_review_comments: auth_utils.py: JWT secret uses weak default - SECURITY VULNERABILITY
routes/auth.py line 314: Password reset code exposed in simulation mode
.env: CORS_ORIGINS='*' allows any origin - should be restricted
No rate limiting middleware configured in server.py
Password validation exists (min 6 chars) but no complexity requirements
context_for_next_testing_agent: Security testing completed. Critical issues: 1) JWT secret using default value, 2) Password reset code exposed. Medium issues: CORS wildcard, no rate limiting. All RBAC and input validation tests pass. Mocked: Orange Money payments.

owasp_coverage.A02_Cryptographic_Failures: PARTIAL - bcrypt used but weak JWT secret
